title: ivesia sabulosa
intro: Ivesia sabulosa, also known as Alpine Ivesia, is a perennial plant species within the Saxifragaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. Ivesia sabulosa has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include supporting immune function, reducing inflammation, and promoting overall well-being.
